llm.summary: The task is complete in substance. The inspected implementation adds Prisma/SQLite dependencies, repo-local Prisma config, migrations, generated client setup, deterministic db preparation, idempotent protected endpoint seed defaults, schema documentation, and repeatability coverage. It maps directly to endpoint-tool-management.md and remains scoped to endpoint persistence without broad UI, MCP, REST, auth, or reset work.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is wired through scripts/db-prepare.mjs to create data/, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and run seed defaults.

db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular endpoint, parameter, and response-case seed rows.

prisma/schema.prisma represents immutable endpoint IDs, names, titles/descriptions, enabled/protected state, delete codes, default responses, timestamps, ordered parameters, response cases, and basic endpoint/case failure configuration fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase persistence shape and documents the seeded default endpoint.
The provided deterministic check summary reports all mandatory gates passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.

summary: The task is complete in substance. The inspected implementation adds Prisma/SQLite dependencies, repo-local Prisma config, migrations, generated client setup, deterministic db preparation, idempotent protected endpoint seed defaults, schema documentation, and repeatability coverage. It maps directly to endpoint-tool-management.md and remains scoped to endpoint persistence without broad UI, MCP, REST, auth, or reset work.
